seeed_rpcble_init.message0: 初始化 BLE 設備 名稱 %1
seeed_rpcble_init.tooltip: 初始化 Wio Terminal rpcBLE 裝置並設定廣播名稱

seeed_rpcble_is_initialized.tooltip: 回傳是否已初始化 BLEDevice

seeed_rpcble_get_address.tooltip: 取得本機 BLE MAC 位址字串

seeed_rpcble_set_mtu.tooltip: 設定 BLE 最大傳輸單元 MTU

seeed_rpcble_create_server.tooltip: 建立 BLE GATT 服務端對象

seeed_rpcble_server_create_service.message0: 服務端 %1 建立服務 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_server_create_service.tooltip: 在 BLE 服務端建立 GATT 服務

seeed_rpcble_service_start.tooltip: 啟動指定 GATT 服務

seeed_rpcble_service_stop.tooltip: 停止指定 GATT 服務

seeed_rpcble_server_connected_count.message0: 服務端 %1 已連接客戶端數量
seeed_rpcble_server_connected_count.tooltip: 取得連接到服務端的 BLE 用戶端數量

seeed_rpcble_server_set_callbacks.message0: 設定服務端 %1 連線事件
seeed_rpcble_server_set_callbacks.tooltip: 為 BLE 服務端設定連線和斷開回調

seeed_rpcble_create_characteristic.message0: 服務 %1 建立特徵 %2 UUID %3 屬性 %4
seeed_rpcble_create_characteristic.tooltip: 在 GATT 服務中建立特徵值

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_permissi.message0: 設定特徵 %1 存取權限 %2
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_permissi.tooltip: 設定特徵值的 GATT 存取權限

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_notify_d.message0: 特徵 %1 新增通知描述符
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_notify_d.tooltip: 為通知特徵新增 BLE2902 描述符

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_descript.message0: 功能 %1 建立描述符 UUID %2 旗標 %3 權限 %4 長度 %5
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_descript.tooltip: 為特徵建立自訂描述符

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_value.tooltip: 設定特徵值為文字數據

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_byte.message0: 設定特徵 %1 位元組值 %2
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_byte.tooltip: 設定特徵值為 1 位元組數據，適合電池電量等標準特徵

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_get_value.tooltip: 讀取本地特徵值的當前文字數據

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_notify.message0: 通知特徵 %1 資料更新
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_notify.tooltip: 向已訂閱客戶端發送通知

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_indicate.message0: 指示特徵 %1 資料更新
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_indicate.tooltip: 發送需要確認的特徵值指示

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_callback.tooltip: 設定特徵寫入回調，並快取最近一次收到的文本

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_received_val.message0: 特徵 %1 最近寫入文本
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_received_val.tooltip: 讀取特徵寫入回調快取的最近文本

seeed_rpcble_advertising_add_service_uui.tooltip: 將服務 UUID 加入 BLE 廣播數據

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_scan_respon.tooltip: 設定是否啟用掃描回應數據

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.message0: 設定廣播首選參數 最小 %1 最大 %2
seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.tooltip: 設定廣播首選連線參數，常用於改善手機相容性

seeed_rpcble_start_advertising.tooltip: 開始廣播，使設備可被掃描發現

seeed_rpcble_scan_create.tooltip: 取得 BLEScan 掃描器對象

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_active.tooltip: 主動掃描更快但更耗電

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_interval.tooltip: 設定 BLE 掃描間隔

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_window.tooltip: 設定 BLE 掃描窗口，通常小於或等於掃描間隔

seeed_rpcble_scan_start.message0: 掃描器 %1 掃描 %2 秒 儲存為 %3 %4
seeed_rpcble_scan_start.tooltip: 啟動 BLE 掃描並儲存掃描結果

seeed_rpcble_scan_stop.tooltip: 停止目前 BLE 掃描

seeed_rpcble_scan_clear_results.message0: 清除掃描器 %1 結果緩存
seeed_rpcble_scan_clear_results.tooltip: 清除掃描結果並釋放內存

seeed_rpcble_scan_results_count.tooltip: 取得掃描到的 BLE 裝置數量

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_name.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 的名稱
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_name.tooltip: 讀取指定掃描結果的設備名稱

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_address.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 的位址
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_address.tooltip: 讀取指定掃描結果的 MAC 位址

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 的 RSSI
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.tooltip: 讀取指定掃描結果的訊號強度 RSSI

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 的服務 UUID
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.tooltip: 讀取指定掃描結果廣播的第一個服務 UUID

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 的完整訊息
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.tooltip: 讀取指定掃描結果的完整描述文本

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.message0: 掃描結果 %1 序號 %2 包含服務 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.tooltip: 判斷指定掃描結果是否廣播了目標服務 UUID

seeed_rpcble_create_client.tooltip: 建立 BLE GATT 客戶端對象

seeed_rpcble_client_connect.message0: 客戶端 %1 連接位址 %2 位址類型 %3
seeed_rpcble_client_connect.tooltip: 連接到指定 BLE MAC 位址

seeed_rpcble_client_disconnect.tooltip: 斷開 BLE 用戶端連接

seeed_rpcble_client_is_connected.tooltip: 判斷 BLE 用戶端是否已連接

seeed_rpcble_client_rssi.tooltip: 讀取客戶端連線的遠端 RSSI

seeed_rpcble_client_get_service.message0: 客戶端 %1 取得遠端服務 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_client_get_service.tooltip: 從遠端 BLE 服務端取得指定 GATT 服務

seeed_rpcble_remote_service_get_characte.message0: 遠端服務 %1 取得特徵 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_remote_service_get_characte.tooltip: 從遠端 GATT 服務取得指定特徵

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_read.message0: 讀取遠端特徵 %1 文本
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_read.tooltip: 讀取遠端 BLE 特徵值文本

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_write.message0: 寫入遠端特徵 %1 文本 %2 %3
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_write.tooltip: 向遠端 BLE 特徵寫入文字數據

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_r.tooltip: 判斷遠端特徵是否支援讀取

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_w.tooltip: 判斷遠端特徵是否支援寫入

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_n.tooltip: 判斷遠端特徵是否支援通知

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_regis.message0: 訂閱遠端特徵 %1 通知 %2
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_regis.tooltip: 訂閱遠端特徵通知並快取收到的數據

seeed_rpcble_remote_notify_value.message0: 遠端特徵 %1 最近通知文本
seeed_rpcble_remote_notify_value.tooltip: 讀取遠端通知回調快取的最近文本

seeed_rpcble_uart_begin.message0: 啟動 BLE UART 服務 名稱 %1
seeed_rpcble_uart_begin.tooltip: 建立 Nordic UART 風格 BLE 服務，適合手機或 Web Bluetooth 進行文字收發

seeed_rpcble_uart_send.tooltip: 透過 BLE UART TX 特徵通知文字數據

seeed_rpcble_uart_connected.tooltip: 判斷 BLE UART 是否有客戶端連接

seeed_rpcble_uart_received.message0: BLE UART 最近收到文字
seeed_rpcble_uart_received.tooltip: 讀取 BLE UART RX 特徵最近收到的文本

seeed_rpcble_uart_on_receive.message0: 當 BLE UART 收到文字時
seeed_rpcble_uart_on_receive.tooltip: 設定 BLE UART 收到文字後的處理邏輯

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.message0: 啟動 Web Bluetooth 電池服務 名稱 %1 初始電量 %2
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.tooltip: 建立標準電池服務 0x180F，方便 Web Bluetooth 範例讀取和訂閱電量

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_set_level.message0: 設定 Web Bluetooth 電量 %1 %2
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_set_level.tooltip: 更新電池電量特徵，可選擇立即通知訂閱客戶端

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_level.tooltip: 讀取電池服務快取的當前電量

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_connected.message0: Web Bluetooth 電池服務已連接
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_connected.tooltip: 判斷電池服務是否有客戶端連接

seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.message0: 啟動 iBeacon 名稱 %1 UUID %2 主要 %3 次要 %4 供應商 ID %5 功率 %6 資訊 %7 類型 %8
seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.tooltip: 配置並啟動 iBeacon 廣播，可附帶掃描回應名稱和文字訊息
